text:
The reference is clearly real and well-documented. Multiple academic papers cite it with exactly these authors (Clémentine Fourrier, Nathan Habib, Alina Lozovskaya, Konrad Szafer, and Thomas Wolf) and the same URL. The automated checker's "author mismatch" flagged "Hugging Face" as the organization, but the cited individual authors are the actual creators of the leaderboard and are consistently cited this way in the academic literature. The URL resolves to the correct Hugging Face Space.

EXPLANATION: The Open LLM Leaderboard v2 is a real, widely-cited non-paper source hosted at the cited URL, and multiple academic papers cite it with exactly the authors listed (Fourrier, Habib, Lozovskaya, Szafer, Wolf); the automated checker's "mismatch" simply reflects organization-level vs. individual-author attribution.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/spaces/open-llm-leaderboard/open_llm_leaderboard
FOUND_TITLE: Open LLM Leaderboard v2
FOUND_AUTHORS: Clémentine Fourrier, Nathan Habib, Alina Lozovskaya, Konrad Szafer, Thomas Wolf
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
